length_range.comment: Length will be snapped to this step (not grid)

width_range.comment: Width will be snapped to this step (not grid)

aspect_ratio.comment: Random ranges for min and max aspect ratios

rotation_variants.comment: Rotation variant generation. prob_90 < prob_180. Set to 0.0 to disable. deduplicate_square skips rotation when |W-H| < grid.

design_constraints.comment: Design-specific size constraints for each device type (designer-adjustable)

L.comment: Length range for 1V NMOS (low-power analog typical)
Length range for 2V NMOS (power stages typical)
Length range for 1V PMOS (low-power analog typical)
Length range for 2V PMOS (power stages typical)

netlist.comment: Netlist generation: N_nets = density * N_blocks, pins per block 3-6

symmetry.comment: Fraction of same-type block pairs that become symmetry pairs. self_sym_probability: chance a leftover same-type block becomes self-symmetric.

validation.comment: Maximum attempts to generate a block with at least one valid variant

power_nets.comment: Minimum fraction of blocks connected to VDD or VSS. Each block connects to at most one power rail via pin P0.
